explanations.pt-br: Fase 1: ChromaDB + SentenceTransformer para indexar documentos como vetores.
explanations.en-us: Phase 1: ChromaDB + SentenceTransformer to index documents as vectors.

explanations.pt-br: Fase 2 (Retrieve): busca semântica no ChromaDB por similaridade vetorial.
explanations.en-us: Phase 2 (Retrieve): semantic search in ChromaDB by vector similarity.

explanations.pt-br: Fase 3 (Generate): modelo GPT-2 do Transformers HuggingFace para gerar texto.
explanations.en-us: Phase 3 (Generate): GPT-2 model from HuggingFace Transformers to generate text.

explanations.pt-br: Pipeline RAG completo: retrieve documentos relevantes → gera resposta fundamentada no contexto.
explanations.en-us: Complete RAG pipeline: retrieve relevant documents → generate answer grounded in context.
